name: dicy
description: A fast-paced, neon-styled dice strategy game. Inspired by the tactical depth of DiceWars and Kdice, Diception delivers quick turns and intense territory conquest.

scripts.tauri:dev:android: npm run android:sync-version && tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:build:mac: tauri build --bundles app && mkdir -p dist-tauri/mac && cp -r src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/*.app dist-tauri/mac/ && cp src-tauri/resources/libsteam_api.dylib dist-tauri/mac/DICEPTION.app/Contents/MacOS/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp steam/game_actions_X.vdf dist-tauri/mac/DICEPTION.app/Contents/MacOS/game_actions_X.vdf
scripts.tauri:build:win: tauri build --bundles nsis && mkdir -p dist-tauri/win && cp src-tauri/target/release/diception.exe dist-tauri/win/ && cp src-tauri/resources/steam_api64.dll dist-tauri/win/ && cp steam/game_actions_X.vdf dist-tauri/win/game_actions_X.vdf
scripts.tauri:build:linux: tauri build && mkdir -p dist-tauri/linux && cp src-tauri/target/release/diception dist-tauri/linux/ && cp src-tauri/resources/libsteam_api.so dist-tauri/linux/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp steam/game_actions_X.vdf dist-tauri/linux/game_actions_X.vdf
scripts.tauri:build:android: npm run android:sync-version && tauri android build && mkdir -p dist-tauri/android && cp src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/*.apk dist-tauri/android/DICEPTION.apk
scripts.android:init: tauri android init && tauri android icon ./public/icon.png
